stories.title: Sights, sounds and more second-round moments
stories.summary: Here is the best of the action from Friday at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: Yanks' Fried headed to 15-day IL with bone bruise
stories.summary: The New York Yankees will place pitcher Max Fried on the 15-day injured list with a left elbow bruise, the team announced Friday.

stories.title: Silent Knights: Media freeze-out costs VGK, Torts
stories.summary: The NHL has stripped the Golden Knights of their second-round pick and fined coach John Tortorella $100,000 for the team's decision to avoid speaking to the media after its series-clinching win over the Ducks.

stories.title: Suspect arrested in shooting of Missouri's Hardy
stories.summary: A 20-year-old man wanted in connection to the shooting of Missouri football star Ahmad Hardy at an outdoor concert in Mississippi has been arrested.

stories.title: Rousey, Carano on weight for 1st MVP MMA card
stories.summary: Gina Carano said she lost 100 pounds over the past two years in an effort to make Saturday's highly anticipated MMA fight against Ronda Rousey come to fruition.
